message:
chore: standardize comment grammar to present tense across core modules

Fix conditional-tense comments ("would exceed", "would be") to present
tense ("exceeds", "is") for clarity and consistency.

cells.rs: 5 grammar fixes in comments/docs
interactive.rs: 1 grammar fix in comment
measure.rs: 1 grammar fix in doc comment

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
